_comment: Bad case 15 — 'continue approach' readback on Tower must NOT be misclassified as INITIAL_CALL_APPROACH. Root cause (fixed 2026-04-24): intent_parser matched the bare keyword 'approach' in the pilot's readback 'continue approach, N123AB', triggering the Approach facility rule. The frequency guard then rejected with 'contact Approach', pushing a Class D VFR pattern pilot to a TRACON that isn't even the correct ATC service for pattern work. Regression asserts the ATC response does NOT redirect to Approach and state stays in PATTERN_ENTRY.
name: Bad case 15 — 'continue approach' readback must not route to Approach (KVRB US)

context.callsign: November Three Five Three Romeo Foxtrot

say.note: Setup — pilot calls Tower inbound to establish PATTERN_ENTRY.
say.text: Vero Beach Tower November Three Five Three Romeo Foxtrot inbound for landing

say.note: Readback of Tower's 'continue approach' instruction. Must NOT be parsed as a call to Approach Control.
